passive.name: Royal Privilege
passive.description: Qiyana's first basic attack or ability against each enemy deals bonus damage.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Innate:}} {{cis|Qiyana}} basic attacks and basic abilities deal {{as|'''additional''' physical damage|physical damage}}.
wiki_detail.blurb2: This effect cannot recur on the same target for a period of time. Gathering an {{as|Element|buzzword}} with ''{{ai|Terrashape|Qiyana}}'' will {{sti|cdr|reset}} the cooldown.
wiki_detail.description:
{{sbc|Innate:}} '''Qiyana's''' [[basic attack]]s and [[champion ability|basic abilities]] deal {{pp|15 to 83|color=physical damage}} {{as|(+ 30% '''bonus''' AD)}} {{as|(+ 30% AP)}} {{as|'''additional''' physical damage|physical damage}}.

This effect cannot occur on the same target more than once every few seconds.
wiki_detail.description2: Gathering an {{as|Element|buzzword}} with ''{{ai|Terrashape|Qiyana}}'' resets ''Royal Privilege's'' per-target {{sti|cooldown}} for enemies affected by ''Royal Privilege'' using a different {{as|Element|buzzword}} (or no {{as|Element|buzzword}}).
wiki_detail.notes:
* ''Royal Privilege's'' trigger from a basic attack can be {{tip|blocked}} (bonus damage is negated and the on-target cooldown does not apply).
* ''Royal Privilege'' will not apply a cooldown to targets that are hit with an {{ai|Elemental Wrath|Qiyana}} that has a different {{ai|Terrashape|Qiyana|Element}} than the {{ai|Terrashape|Qiyana|Element}} '''Qiyana''' currently holds.
** This does not occur if a new {{ai|Elemental Wrath|Qiyana}} with a different {{ai|Terrashape|Qiyana|Element}} is cast before the first one lands.
* The effect will not trigger against [[structures]] nor [[ward]]s.
* {{Pending for test}}: ''Royal Privilege's'' interaction with ''parrying'' effects ({{tip|dodge}}, {{tip|blind}}).

Q.name: Elemental Wrath / Edge of Ixtal
Q.description: Qiyana swings her weapon, dealing damage with a bonus effect based on her element.
Q.tooltip:
If Qiyana does not have an Enchantment, she slashes, dealing {{ vanilladamage }} physical damage to enemies in a small area. If she does, this Ability gains extra range and an additional effect based on the type of Enchantment:Ice Enchantment: Briefly Roots, then Slows by {{ slowpotency*-100 }}% for {{ slowduration }} second.Rock Enchantment: Deals an additional {{ tremordamage }} physical damage to units below {{ critthreshold*100 }}% Health.Wild Enchantment: Leaves a trail that turns Qiyana Invisible and grants {{ haste*100 }}% Move Speed.
{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

W.name: Terrashape
W.description: Qiyana dashes to a location and enchants her weapon with an element. Her attacks and abilities deal bonus damage while her weapon is enchanted.
W.tooltip:
Passive: While Qiyana's weapon is Enchanted, she gains {{ attackspeed*100 }}% Attack Speed and her Attacks deal an additional {{ onhitdamage }} magic damage. She also gains {{ passivems*100 }}% Move Speed while out of combat near the corresponding terrain type.

Active: Qiyana dashes towards a nearby brush, terrain, or river and Enchants her weapon with that particular terrain type. This refreshes Elemental Wrath / Edge of Ixtal's Cooldown.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Passive:}} While holding an {{as|Element|buzzword}}, {{ci|Qiyana}} gains '''bonus''' {{sti|as|{{as|attack speed}}}} and {{sti|range|attack range}}, as well as {{as|'''bonus''' magic damage}} on her basic attacks and basic abilities. '''Qiyana''' gains {{sti|ms|{{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}}}} speed while moving near the current {{as|Element|buzzword}}.
wiki_detail.blurb2: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Qiyana''' {{tip|dashes}} in the target direction to gather the {{as|Element|buzzword}} of the nearest {{cci|Terrashape Brush.png}} {{sbc|{{as|Brush}}}}, {{cci|Terrashape River.png}} {{sbc|{{as|River}}}} or {{cci|Terrashape Rock.png}} {{sbc|{{as|Terrain}}}} she targeted.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Passive:}} While holding an {{as|Element|buzzword}}, '''Qiyana''' gains {{sti|as|{{as|'''bonus''' attack speed}}}}, {{sti|range|25 '''bonus''' attack range}} and {{as|'''bonus''' magic damage}} on her basic attacks {{tip|on-hit}} and basic abilities. While [[Combat status|out-of-combat]] and moving near the {{as|Element|buzzword}} currently being held, she gains {{sti|ms|{{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}}}}.
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Qiyana''' {{tip|dashes}} up to 300 units towards the target location to gather the {{as|Element|buzzword}} of the nearest {{cci|Terrashape Brush.png}} {{sbc|{{as|Brush}}}}, {{cci|Terrashape River.png}} {{sbc|{{as|River}}}} or {{cci|Terrashape Rock.png}} {{sbc|{{as|Terrain}}}} she targeted.
wiki_detail.description3: ''A target Element is required to cast this ability''.
wiki_detail.description4: Once ''Terrashape'' has been learned, '''Qiyana''' is automatically given the {{cci|Terrashape Rock.png}} {{sbc|{{as|Terrain}}}} element upon [[Death|respawning]].
wiki_detail.description5: '''''Qiyana''' can cast any of her abilities during the dash.''
wiki_detail.notes:
* ''Terrashape'' does not interact with [[Terrain#Player-Generated|player-generated terrain]].
* The water puddles formed by the {{ui|Ocean Drake|Ocean Rift}} on {{tip|Summoner's Rift}} count as valid terrain for obtaining the {{cci|Terrashape River.png}} {{sbc|{{as|River}}}} element.
* The {{tip|brush|brushes}} grown by {{cai|Brushmaker|Ivern}} count for gathering the {{cci|Terrashape Brush.png}} {{sbc|{{as|Brush}}}} element.
* Passive bonus damage from basic attacks can be {{tip|blocked}}.
* The passive damage works with {{iis|Guinsoo's Rageblade}} ''Phantom Hit''.
* {{Pending for test}}: Passive bonus damage interaction with ''parrying'' effects ({{tip|dodge}}, {{tip|blind}}).

E.name: Audacity
E.description: Qiyana dashes to an enemy, damaging them.
E.tooltip: Qiyana dashes through an enemy and deals {{ damage }} physical damage to them.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Qiyana}} {{tip|dash|dashes}} toward the target enemy and deals {{as|physical damage}} upon arrival.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Qiyana''' {{tip|dash|dashes}} a fixed distance in the direction of the target enemy. If they are in range upon arrival, she deals {{as|physical damage}}.
wiki_detail.description2: '''''Qiyana''' can cast any of her abilities during the dash.''
wiki_detail.notes: * ''Audacity'' only damages targets if within 250 range upon completion of the dash.

R.name: Supreme Display of Talent
R.description: Qiyana sends out a shockwave that detonates whatever elements she hits with it, stunning and damaging nearby enemies.
R.tooltip:
Qiyana launches a shockwave that Knocks Back enemies and detonates when it hits terrain. The explosion follows the entire edge of the terrain, Stunning for between 0.5 and {{ stunduration }} seconds and dealing {{ damage }} plus {{ missinghealthdamagerock }} max Health physical damage. Stun duration scales down with distance the shockwave has travelled.

Any river or brush the shockwave passes through also explode after a delay for the same damage and Stun.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Qiyana}} sweeps a windblast in the target direction that {{tip|airborne|knocks back}} enemies hit and stops upon hitting {{sbc|{{as|Terrain}}}}.
wiki_detail.blurb2: The windblast creates a cascading shockwave across any {{sbc|{{as|River}}}} or {{sbc|{{as|Brush}}}} it passes, as well as around the borders of {{sbc|{{as|Terrain}}}} it hits. The shockwave briefly {{tip|stun|stuns}} enemies hit and deals {{as|physical damage}} based on {{as|their '''maximum''' health}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Qiyana''' sweeps a windblast in the target direction that {{tip|airborne|knocks back}} enemies hit, though not through terrain, and stops upon hitting {{sbc|{{as|Terrain}}}}.
wiki_detail.description2: The windblast creates a cascading shockwave across any {{sbc|{{as|River}}}} or {{sbc|{{as|Brush}}}} it passes through, as well as around the borders of {{sbc|{{as|Terrain}}}} it reaches, dealing {{as|physical damage}} to enemies hit, {{tip|stun|stunning}} them for {{pp|changedisplay=true|type=proximity|0.5;1|0;X}} seconds, and briefly granting {{tip|sight}} of the area along its path. The damage based on the target's health ratio is capped against {{tip|monster|monsters}}.
wiki_detail.leveling2:
{{st|Physical Damage|{{ap|100 to 300 3}} {{as|(+ 125% '''bonus''' AD)}} {{as|(+ 10% of target's '''maximum''' health)}}}}
{{st|Capped Monster Health Damage|{{ap|500 to 1000 3}} {{as|(+ 125% '''bonus''' AD)}}}}
wiki_detail.notes:
* The windblast needs only to reach near terrain to trigger the terrain shockwave.
* The shockwave grants sight along each part of its path for {{fd|0.75}} seconds.
* Artificial terrain (e.g, {{cai|Crystallize|Anivia}}, {{cai|Weaver's Wall|Taliyah}}, {{cai|Pillar of Ice|Trundle}}) touching map terrain will be treated as a single piece of terrain, even when bridging two pieces of map terrain together; the shockwave will wrap around all connecting terrain. The shockwave's path is determined once it initially spreads; any expired terrain will be treated as if it were still there.
* {{tip|Projectile|Projectile-intercepting}} effects will block the windblast but not the shockwave.
{{Effect at cast time end}}
